_purpose: Smoke-shape input fixture for the doe.tsir.real.embed kernel. The bootstrap oracle does not yet support 'embed' (BOOTSTRAP_ORACLE_KERNELS = {fused_gemv, rms_norm, gather}); this fixture exists so the canary can locate paired inputs by kernel name and produce a 'not_implemented' deferred receipt rather than FileNotFoundError. Real-shape dims are captured in runtime/zig/tests/tsir/real/embed/embed.notes.md (num_tokens=32, hidden_size=1536, vocab_size=262144 at Gemma 4 E2B); these smoke values are intentionally tiny so the file stays compact.
